alerts.message: Multiple picks can still come from one team when roles are clearly distinct.
Multiple picks can still come from one team when roles are clearly distinct.

zh_writer failed: zh_writer timed out after 90 seconds
Maxi ARAUJO的正文中“他先送出助攻，又在第43分钟完成逆转扳平”顺序错误，证据显示他先在第44分钟（或43分钟，看具体来源）打入扳平球，随后在第50分钟助攻Canobbio，应调整为先扳平再助攻。
draft_fact_check 的警告涉及 Maxi ARAUJO，与本条萨拉赫稿件无关，已忽略；同时已删除草稿中无证据支撑的
次身后接应"，仅保留证据中的
次接应成功"。
zh_final_editor failed: zh_final_editor timed out after 90 seconds
draft中"5次打穿防线，5次接应成功，15次身后接应"无结构化证据支撑，已删除。
draft中"让他的贡献不只停在一个标签上"属空话，已删除。
evidence仅含逆转扳平、扳平进球、取得进球、送出助攻，正文严格据此撰写，不新增任何事实。
zh_final_editor failed: zh_final_editor timed out after 90 seconds
The draft claims Salah 'equalised to level the score' but the evidence shows his goal (66') made it 1-2 (go-ahead), not an equaliser; the equaliser was scored by MOSTAFA ZICO at 57'.
The draft claims Salah 'struck the stoppage-time winner' – his goal was at 66', not stoppage time. The final goal was by TREZEGUET at 82'.
The draft says Salah 'completed seven line-breaking passes' – evidence shows 7 'line_breaks_completed', not 'line-breaking passes'; passes and line breaks are distinct metrics.

The draft: Oyarzabal 'made 25 runs off the back line, with 9 of those passes reaching him' – evidence shows 'in_behind: 25' and 'offers_received: 9', but 'offers_received' is not described as passes reaching him; also 'runs off the back line' is an invented tactical description.

Maxi ARAUJO: 'kept the attack moving with 32 in-behind runs and 8 received passes into dangerous areas' – evidence has 'in_behind: 32' and 'offers_received: 8', but 'received passes into dangerous areas' is over-interpretation.
MOSTAFA ZICO: 'set up a teammate's goal' – evidence shows he assisted MOHAMED SALAH (goal at 66'), which is supported. No other issues for that item.
MARAWAN ATTIA: '31 line breaks' – evidence confirms 'line_breaks_completed: 31'. 'Repeatedly piercing New Zealand's defense' is a permissible summary; no strict violation.

Kevin DE BRUYNE: '29 passes and made 31 runs in behind' – evidence shows 'offers_received: 29' and 'in_behind: 31', but 'passes' is not equivalent to 'offers_received'; also 'quiet connector' and 'holding possession' are not explicitly supported.
The draft's 'received passes into dangerous areas' has been replaced with 'runs in behind' to avoid over-interpretation of offers_received.
The draft claims Salah 'equalised to level the score' but the evidence shows his goal (66') made it 1-2 (go-ahead), not an equaliser; the equaliser was scored by MOSTAFA ZICO at 57'.
The draft claims Salah 'struck the stoppage-time winner' – his goal was at 66', not stoppage time. The final goal was by TREZEGUET at 82'.
The draft says Salah 'completed seven line-breaking passes' – evidence shows 7 'line_breaks_completed', not 'line-breaking passes'; passes and line breaks are distinct metrics.

The draft: Oyarzabal 'made 25 runs off the back line, with 9 of those passes reaching him' – evidence shows 'in_behind: 25' and 'offers_received: 9', but 'offers_received' is not described as passes reaching him; also 'runs off the back line' is an invented tactical description.

Maxi ARAUJO: 'kept the attack moving with 32 in-behind runs and 8 received passes into dangerous areas' – evidence has 'in_behind: 32' and 'offers_received: 8', but 'received passes into dangerous areas' is over-interpretation.
MOSTAFA ZICO: 'set up a teammate's goal' – evidence shows he assisted MOHAMED SALAH (goal at 66'), which is supported. No other issues for that item.
MARAWAN ATTIA: '31 line breaks' – evidence confirms 'line_breaks_completed: 31'. 'Repeatedly piercing New Zealand's defense' is a permissible summary; no strict violation.

Kevin DE BRUYNE: '29 passes and made 31 runs in behind' – evidence shows 'offers_received: 29' and 'in_behind: 31', but 'passes' is not equivalent to 'offers_received'; also 'quiet connector' and 'holding possession' are not explicitly supported.
